label: Transparent sorrel leaf motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a sorrel leaf motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete botanical subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A realistic field-edge sorrel leaf cluster: several arrowhead/heart-shaped sorrel leaves with sharp pointed lobes, rust-red veins and red-green mottling, slender green stems, cream-tinted young leaf edges, matte botanical texture, fine vein structure, and a crisp angular silhouette. The identity must read as sorrel leaf, not clover, spinach, basil, ivy, maple, or generic salad greens.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full leaves and stems without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves rust red, green stem, cream highlights, and leaf texture. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or pattern. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no soil, no pot, no field landscape, no hand, no plate, no props, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sorrel light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sorrel", derived from a field-edge sorrel leaf motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible sharp content system.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 horizontal design-system board, 3840 x 2160 target, clean professional UI presentation, crisp editorial content/product system mood. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sorrel, Sorrel Leaf, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from sorrel leaves with arrowhead/heart-shaped sharp pointed lobes, rust-red veins, red-green mottled leaf planes, slender green stems, cream field-edge dry grass neutrals, matte botanical texture, and crisp angular silhouettes. Use only motif-derived colors: rust red, green stem, deep leaf green, cream field-edge neutrals, muted clay-red shadows, pale vein cream, and sharp content accents.
Typography: English content and editorial product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Show compact bilingual content management, publishing, analytics, and review workflow labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, content tiles, document preview cards, moderation queue cards, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, tables, command search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, status chips, spacing scale, 8px radius samples, border, shadows, leaf-vein texture samples, theme token swatches, simple icons.
Style: sharp content system, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, cream editorial surfaces, rust-red primary actions and warnings, stem-green navigation and success states, deep leaf ink text, pale vein-cream highlights, thin angular leaf-stem dividers, subtle sorrel vein texture overlays, dense but scannable dashboards, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no flower identity, no clover or basil identity, no stock photo collage, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sorrel", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sorrel dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Sorrel" / "Sorrel Leaf". Translate the same light design-system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 horizontal design-system board, 3840 x 2160 target, clean professional shadcn/tweakcn presentation, sharp content system mood. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sorrel, Sorrel Leaf, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Tables, Command / Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Reference use: Preserve rust-red primary actions, muted clay-red warning states, stem-green navigation and success states, deep leaf ink backgrounds, cream field-edge foreground text, pale vein-cream borders, subtle sorrel leaf-vein texture, angular leaf-lobe dividers, content cards, analytics dashboards, moderation queues, publishing tables, command search, and an 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as sorrel leaf, not clover, spinach, basil, ivy, flower, or generic salad greens.
Typography: English content and editorial product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Noto Sans JP, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値. Use compact bilingual content management, publishing, analytics, and review workflow labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, document cards, content queue cards, analytics metrics, publishing table rows, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, sidebar navigation, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, icon set.
Visual details: deepest leaf green-charcoal background, rust-brown panels, rust-red active states, green stem focus rings and success chips, cream text and subdued surfaces, pale vein separators, low-contrast sorrel leaf texture overlays, crisp sharp controls and dashboards, restrained contrast, professional content-system feel.
Constraints: no neon red, no generic black-and-red gaming UI, no pure-black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradient dominance, no flower identity, no clover or basil identity, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Sorrel", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
